openQuestions.text: Gap analysis: what does the 8-child scaffold miss vs wave-1 + wave-2 findings?
Per-child risk hotspots: which of 002-009 is under-scoped or mis-ordered?
Hidden dependency cycles beyond the linear 002-009 chain?
Is 019/004 corpus adequate for 005 hard gate + adversarial class (wave-2 X5)?
Runtime-specific edge cases for 006/007/008 not captured in specs?
Observability contract completeness (metrics, JSONL, alerts, health)?

Migration compatibility when hook lands in existing sessions?
